characters.name: 5th Grade Teacher
characters.description: The 5th Grade Teacher is a character inThe Body Machine, as well as theBody Machine Girl's teacher. She is a young African-American woman with short black hair parted off to the side, and a white collared shirt with a light green jacket and earrings.

characters.name: Barter
characters.description: Barteris a wild, savage man of tribal Subsaharic blood. He appeared inThis For ThatfromMoney Rock. He is a Subsaharic savage man with dark skin, a straw hat, a light yellow toga, orange sandals, and a goaty beard.

characters.name: Baseball Kid
characters.description: The Baseball Kid is a character inThem Not-so-Dry Bones. He is a young Caucasian boy with light brown hair, a red baseball cap, a gray "REDS" uniform, and socks with red and white stripes. He is seen chewing gum, and really blows a big bubble. Then, he gets hit in the skull with a falling baseball.

characters.name: Basketball players
characters.description: The basketball players are characters inThree Is a Magic Number. They wear our jersey as well. The boy on the left (Joe) has short red curly hair. The boy with black hair and glasses (James) points at #15's jersey. The one in the middle (Jordan) is slightly taller and has black sideburns. The next-to-last boy (Jonathan) has short blond hair. The boy on the right (Jamal) has a black afro. None of the guys have noses and three out of five guys are Caucasian.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: I A Bill Variation Billis the main character of "I'm Just a Bill". He was sad because is waiting to become a law. He also speaks to his human friend, Sheldon, to learn on how a bill becomes a law. He wears many other outfits, or at least his clones waiting in line. (Soldier hat, apron and glasses, kid version with twin sister, hunter’s cap, shotgun, naked self.)

characters.name: Black Businessman
characters.description: The black businessman is a character that appears inThe Check's In the Mail. He is an African-American man with a curved flat top, white glasses, a curved thin mustache, a white shirt with a polka-dotted bowtie, a light blue suit jacket, a black belt with a round buckle, gray plaid pants, and black dress shoes. He is easily worried, as he is seen looking at the amounts in his checkbook.
